checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: Issue 117 implements the required post-merge memory closure pattern established by issues 089 and 107. CURRENT_GOAL, README, and issue 115 artifacts are updated to reflect the confirmed PR 116 merge.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: CURRENT_GOAL.md no longer claims issue 115 as the active phase. README marks the evidence loop as complete. Issue 115 final report, audit packet, and ChatGPT/Codex audit record PR 116 merge and CI completion. Issue 117 closure artifact created.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: Changes are limited to memory, evidence, and documentation. No product code, scripts, workflows, secrets, production, billing, auth, authorization, database, dependency installation, CI/CD security, or deployment files were changed.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: Changed files are limited to README, CURRENT_GOAL, issue 115 artifacts, and issue 117 closure artifacts. No protected paths touched.

checked_dimensions.name: changed_file_scope
checked_dimensions.evidence: All changed files are declared in `.specbridge/scopes/issue-117-post-merge-memory-closure.scope.json`.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: Contract validation, scope validation, final report validation, audit packet validation, ChatGPT audit validation, security gate validation, review gate validation, and whitespace validation passed locally.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: GitHub CI is pending for the issue 117 PR and remains an external merge gate. The final report marks CI as not_collected.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: The final report accurately records local completion pending PR CI without claiming post-merge facts.

findings.evidence: PR, CI, and merge for issue 117 are pending external GitHub gates.
findings.recommendation: Open the PR, wait for required checks, and merge only if policy gates pass.

unresolved_risks: GitHub CI and PR merge are pending for issue 117 branch.
